assignment.name: Typed Ledger API
assignment.author: lognd
assignment.description: The same in-memory ledger domain as tiny-ledger-api, rebuilt with FastAPI: a pydantic BaseModel declares an item's shape once, and the framework validates every request body and generates 422 errors for bad input, instead of the hand-written 400 checks the Flask assignment required -- graded via FastAPI's TestClient for exact status codes, framework-generated 422 error shape, response_model field-stripping, id sequencing, PUT-replaces-not-merges semantics, and factory isolation, with no real network traffic.
